observed_behavior: SEASON_CAP_PER_TEAM=5 defined but never checked; no server validation; ETL appends without count check
gap: MYM submissions accepted without limit; 5th+ submission not rejected
risk_summary: Owner exploits by submitting 10+ MYM in season; league cap unenforceable
recommended_fix: Worker /offer-mym: count existing MYMs before dispatch; ETL: pre-append count check; CCC: separate UI display for MYM count
blocked_by: Worker code fix + ETL validation + CCC UI change

observed_behavior: Milestones=[Sep 30; Oct 31; Nov 30; season_end]; drop on 9/30 earns 25% (step=1)
risk_summary: Pre-season cuts (Sep 1-30) show 25% lower penalties; owners could time cuts to minimize cap hits
recommended_fix: Change milestones to [Oct 1; Nov 1; Dec 1; season_end]; re-verify historical drop penalties 2010-2026
blocked_by: Code fix + regression testing on historical data

observed_behavior: No 50% validation in UI or worker; line 4105 handles IR relief (different rule)
gap: Owner can send 100% of opponent's salary as cap money in trade

recommended_fix: Worker: validate trade_cap_money <= 50% * sum(traded_away_player_salary) per side; validate includes non-salary asset; reject if fail

recommended_fix: Worker: check current date between season-end and contract deadline; reject if outside window; CCC: date-based tab toggle
